system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.mes_dinhmuc_govan_create","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[MES_DINHMUC_GOVAN_CREATE]
(
  @masp_nhamay NVARCHAR(50),
  @masp_mausac nvarchar(MAX)
)
AS
SELECT masp, A.mact, A.stt, A.chitiet, A.nguyenlieu, A.id_nguyenlieu,
	A.dayy_tc, A.rong_tc, A.dai_tc, A.soluong_tc, A.m3_tc, A.m2_tc, 
	A.dayy_sc, A.rong_sc, A.dai_sc, A.soluong_sc, A.m3_sc, A.ghichu,
	A.veneer_matchinh, A.veneer_matphu, A.mong1, A.mong2	,
	A.veneer_dan_canh, A.uv_canhdai, A.uv_canhngan, 
	ISNULL(A.uv_matchinh,0) AS uv_matchinh, 
	ISNULL(A.uv_matphu,0) AS uv_matphu,
	A.veneer_canhdai,A.veneer_canhngan, A.banve,
	fsc_100, fsc_mix, fsc_cw, fsc_recycled, non_fsc, fsc_id,
	uv_matchinh1, uv_matphu1, uv_canhdai1, uv_canhngan1, uv_code, phoi_tructiep
INTO #DINHMUC
FROM mes_dinhmuc_govan A
WHERE 0 = 1

DECLARE @masp nvarchar(100)
DECLARE @mausac nvarchar(100)
DECLARE cur CURSOR LOCAL FOR
	SELECT masp, mausac FROM tr_sanpham
	WHERE masp_nhamay = @masp_nhamay
	  AND mausac IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@masp_mausac, ','))
	  AND active = 1
OPEN cur
FETCH NEXT FROM cur INTO @masp, @mausac
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO #DINHMUC
  SELECT @masp, A.mact, A.stt, A.chitiet, A.nguyenlieu, A.id_nguyenlieu,
	A.dayy_tc, A.rong_tc, A.dai_tc, A.soluong_tc, A.m3_tc, A.m2_tc, 
	A.dayy_sc, A.rong_sc, A.dai_sc, A.soluong_sc, A.m3_sc, ISNULL(B.ghichu, A.ghichu),
	A.veneer_matchinh, A.veneer_matphu, A.mong1, A.mong2,
	A.veneer_dan_canh, A.uv_canhdai, A.uv_canhngan, 
	ISNULL(A.uv_matchinh,0) AS uv_matchinh, 
	ISNULL(A.uv_matphu,0) AS uv_matphu,
	A.veneer_canhdai,A.veneer_canhngan, A.banve,
	A.fsc_100, A.fsc_mix, A.fsc_cw, A.fsc_recycled, A.non_fsc, A.fsc_id,
	A.uv_matchinh1, A.uv_matphu1, A.uv_canhdai1, A.uv_canhngan1, A.uv_code, A.phoi_tructiep
  FROM mes_dinhmuc_govan A
	LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM mes_dinhmuc_govan_ghichu WHERE masp_nhamay = @masp_nhamay AND masp_mausac = @mausac) B ON A.masp = B.masp_nhamay AND A.mact = B.mact
  WHERE A.masp = @masp_nhamay 
  
  FETCH NEXT FROM cur INTO @masp, @mausac
END
CLOSE cur
DEALLOCATE cur

SELECT * FROM #DINHMUC
ORDER BY masp, (CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(stt) = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ,LEN(stt),stt

DROP TABLE #DINHMUC","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.fn_split","dbo.mes_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.mes_dinhmuc_govan_ghichu","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
